name: Extend Videos
description: Extend videos to match target durations by freezing the last frame. Use this to sync video with TTS narration.
doc:
Extend video clips to specific durations.

How it Works:
Freezes the last frame to reach target duration. Useful when video clips are shorter than corresponding audio.

Typical Workflow:
1. Generate TTS audio segments
2. Generate video clips
3. Extend videos to match TTS durations
4. Combine with Video Append
5. Mix audio with Audio Mixer

Inputs:
• Videos Array - clips to extend
• Target Durations - array of seconds

inputs.name: Target Durations
inputs.description: Array of target durations in seconds for each video

properties.name: Output Filename
properties.description: Base filename for output videos (without extension)
